import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_token = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if is_ws
      if in_token
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      if not in_token
        start = i
        in_token = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_token
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
  match list.index_of(nums, target)
  when Some(i)
    println("index=#{i}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
